scripts.build: cd ../.. && pnpm docs:build && cd store/console && npx vite build && cd ../../workers/host && node build.js
scripts.dev: cd ../.. && pnpm docs:build && cd store/console && npx vite build && cd ../../workers/host && node build.js && wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: cd ../.. && pnpm docs:build && cd store/console && npx vite build && cd ../../workers/host && node build.js && wrangler deploy
